L4 Knowledge Graph — Entity-Relationship graph for NEXUS.      Uses NetworkX D
Add an entity to the knowledge graph.          Args:             name: Entity
Add a relationship between two entities.          Args:             source_na
Get relationships for an entity.          Args:             name: Entity name
Find all paths between two entities.          Args:             source_name:
Get neighboring entities up to a given degree.
Search entities by name (simple text matching).
Extract a subgraph around an entity.
Remove an entity and all its relationships.
Persist the knowledge graph to a JSON file.          Args:             path:
Load the knowledge graph from a JSON file.          Args:             path: F
Import a graph from JSON. Returns number of nodes imported.
